memberdef.name: HIPDNN_RETURN_ON_BACKEND_FAILURE
memberdef.initializer: do \ { \ if((backend_status) != HIPDNN_STATUS_SUCCESS) \ { \ std::array<char, 1024> backend_err_msg{}; \ hipdnn_frontend::detail::hipdnnBackend()->getLastErrorString(backend_err_msg.data(), \ backend_err_msg.size()); \ std::string full_error_msg \ = std::string(error_message) + " Backend error: " + backend_err_msg.data(); \ return Error(ErrorCode::HIPDNN_BACKEND_ERROR, full_error_msg); \ } \ } while(0)
